SECTION 1  
"An innocent person would likely feel betrayed and confused after receiving a false verdict from the court."  
"Such a situation would lead to a sense of injustice and a desire for fairness, even if the person is not guilty."  

SECTION 2  
"A stranger might offer support or advice, hoping to help the person navigate the aftermath of the injustice."  
"Silver lining could emerge, such as the opportunity to seek redress or seek legal assistance, though it would require courage and determination."
